title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Looking for Hotel Manager at Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises:
Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lite Bite Foods International Enterprises!
